role: Intelligence Officer, Quds Force Lebanon Corps (d. 2026)
bio: Alireza Bi-Azar served as an intelligence officer in the [IRGC Quds Force Lebanon Corps](/orgs/irgc-quds-force-lebanon-corps), the unit responsible for managing IRGC operations in Lebanon and coordinating with [Hezbollah](/orgs/hezbollah). He was killed during the 2026 war as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave) and associated operations targeting the Lebanon Corps.

sources.title: Quds Force Lebanon Corps Intelligence Officer Killed

editorial_notes: Killed in 2026 war, specific date not confirmed. Intelligence Officer, Quds Force Lebanon Corps.
